# Architecture Rules
<!-- Generated by Clauding Thought /init -- project-specific architectural constraints -->

## Module Boundaries

<!-- Derived from manifest.boundaries -->

Allowed imports:
{{#each modules_may_import}}
- `{{module}}` may import from: `{{allowed}}`
{{/each}}

Shared layer: `{{shared_layer}}` -- all modules may import from this.

**Violation:** Any import that crosses these boundaries is an architecture finding.

## Application Layers

<!-- Derived from manifest.architecture.layers -->

Request lifecycle:
```
{{layer_flow}}
```

- Business logic belongs in: `{{business_logic_location}}`
- Controllers must NOT contain business logic beyond delegation
- Models must NOT contain workflow logic (only relationships, scopes, accessors)

## Migration Safety

- Destructive operations (`dropColumn`, `dropTable`, `dropIndex`) MUST have a working `down()` method
- Column modifications MUST restate all existing column attributes (Laravel requirement)
- New foreign keys MUST use `constrained()->cascadeOnDelete()` unless explicitly justified

## API Contracts

- Changes to existing API response shapes require: {{api_change_process}}
- New endpoints must follow the established `{{api_style}}` pattern
- Response serialization: `{{serialization_approach}}`

## Core Stability

Changes to these locations affect the entire application -- flag for review:
{{#each core_files}}
- `{{path}}` -- {{description}}
{{/each}}
